summary: No evidence found of specific US operation in Venezuela or UNGA resolution activity
content: Extensive search found no concrete evidence of: (1) a specific US military operation in Venezuela in Jan 2026, (2) any UNGA emergency session or draft resolution on Venezuela, (3) any prediction market activity on this topic. The question has 96 forecasters but no CP available (AIB tournament). No CP history data points. Key considerations: UNGA has historically almost never formally condemned US military operations. Even the fastest precedent (Russia-Ukraine ES-11/1) took 5 days with near-universal consensus. US diplomatic leverage makes condemnation resolutions much harder. The timeframe is only ~20 days. Even if an operation exists, UNGA condemnation within this window is unlikely.
